title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at RMZ Corp International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RMZ Corp International Enterprises:
RMZ Corp International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
